page_content:
EDSP600 Issues and Trends in Educating Individuals with Disabilities (3 Credits)

Examines research and practice relevant to the education of individuals with disabilities.

Prerequisite: 9 credits in EDSP courses.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

EDSP601 Special Education for School Counselors (3 Credits) Designed to give school counseling students an understanding of the needs of children with disabilities, and the school-based services that they received. The course focuses on the school counselor's role in identifying and supporting children who have disabilities.
